title: QA Junior Engineer (Playwright)
description: We are looking for a QA Junior Engineer to write end-to-end tests with Playwright and TypeScript, create test cases, execute regression testing and report bugs with clear evidence. Requirements: JavaScript or TypeScript, Git, test case writing, bug reports and intermediate English.

title: QA Junior Engineer (Playwright)
description: Duplicate posting of the same QA Junior Engineer position at BlueOrbit Software, republished by a partner job board with a slightly different URL but the same title and company, used to validate duplicate detection in the pipeline.

This fixture job has an empty title on purpose. The QA validation layer must flag it with a high severity issue on the title field and mark the job as invalid so it never reaches the final ranking report.

title: Backend Junior Node.js Developer
description: This fixture job has an invalid URL on purpose. The QA validation layer must flag the url field with a high severity issue. The description itself is long enough to pass the minimum description length validation rule of the pipeline.
